title: 10 best herbal capsules for heartburn

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yellow gentian capsules helps with heartburn because they contain extracts of Gentiana lutea, a natural herb that has anti-inflammatory and antacid properties. The herb's alkaloids, including amarogentin and gentiopicrin, help to neutralize stomach acid and reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining. This can provide fast and effective relief from heartburn symptoms, such as burning chest pain and regurgitation of food. By soothing the digestive tract and reducing acidity, yellow gentian capsules can bring welcome relief for those suffering from frequent or severe heartburn episodes.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yellow gentian's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce inflammation in the esophagus, which can alleviate symptoms of heartburn and acid reflux.
Antacid: The herb has natural antacid properties, which help neutralize excess stomach acid and relieve heartburn and indigestion.

Gastroprotective: Yellow gentian's gastroprotective effects help protect the mucous membranes in the digestive tract from damage caused by stomach acid and other irritants, reducing the risk of inflammation and tissue damage.
remedy_constituents: Gentianine: This alkaloid helps to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, thereby alleviating symptoms of heartburn.

Gentiopicroside: This iridoid glycoside has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the esophagus and stomach, reducing heartburn symptoms.

Amadori Rearrangement Products (ARPs): These compounds, specifically gentisic acid and 4,5-dihydroxy-2-hexenal, have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and protective effects on the gastrointestinal tract, reducing inflammation and damage caused by heartburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: The root is the most commonly used part due to its high concentration of gentiopicroside, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties that helps soothe heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried roots of gentiana lutea from a trusted source or cultivate your own in a controlled environment for optimal potency.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 5 minutes.
Mix the powder with a binding agent such as gum arabic in a 1:1 ratio by weight for a total of about 10 minutes.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with the mixture using a capsule filler for about 15 minutes.
Label and store the capsules in a cool dark place for up to 12 months to preserve their medicinal properties.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel capsules helps with heartburn because they contain compounds that have a natural antacid property, which can help neutralize stomach acid and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and discomfort. The active ingredients in fennel capsules work to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and spasms that can contribute to heartburn. Additionally, fennel's carminative properties help to expel gas and bloating, further relieving pressure on the stomach lining and providing quick relief from heartburn symptoms.
remedy_properties: Fenchone: Fenchone, a compound found in fennel seeds, has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.
Mucilage: The mucilage content in fennel capsules forms a protective barrier in the digestive tract, soothing and protecting the esophageal lining from acid reflux and reducing symptoms of heartburn.

Anethole: Anethole, a volatile oil present in fennel seeds, has natural antacid properties that can help neutralize stomach acid and reduce heartburn symptoms by stabilizing the pH levels in the stomach.
remedy_constituents: Foeniculin: Foeniculin has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe the esophageal lining and reduce inflammation associated with heartburn.
Anethole: Anethole is a terpene that has a relaxing effect on the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and alleviating symptoms of heartburn.
Coumarins: Coumarins in Foeniculum vulgare have a calming effect on the digestive system, reducing acid production and promoting the healing of the esophageal lining to alleviate heartburn.
remedy_parts: Seeds: Seeds are used due to their high oil content, particularly fennel essential oil, which helps to soothe digestive issues and alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Leaves: Leaves are used because of their anise-like flavor and potential anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation in the digestive tract and provide heartburn relief.
Fruits: Fruits (or more accurately, the fruit's seeds and essential oils) are used due to their carminative properties, which can help to reduce gas and alleviate heartburn symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems when they are at their peak potency and dry them immediately.
Dry the harvested foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems for 7 to 10 days in a warm well-ventilated area.
Grind the dried foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice mill.
Mix 1 part of the foeniculum vulgare powder with 2 parts of a natural binding agent like gelatin or plant cellulose.
Fill empty capsules with the foeniculum vulgare mixture and seal them securely to maintain potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with heartburn because of their ability to soothe and heal the digestive tract. The gel inside the aloe leaf contains anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, alleviating symptoms of heartburn such as burning sensations and acid reflux. Additionally, aloe capsules can help increase the production of mucous in the esophagus, providing a natural barrier against stomach acid and reducing discomfort. As a result, aloe capsules provide long-lasting relief from heartburn symptoms without disrupting daily life.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, alleviating symptoms of heartburn and acid reflux.

Gastroprotective properties: The polysaccharides present in aloe vera have been shown to protect the stomach lining from damage caused by stomach acids and other irritants, reducing the risk of heartburn and related discomforts.

Antioxidant properties: Aloe vera's antioxidant compounds help neutralize free radicals that can contribute to oxidative stress and inflammation in the digestive tract, further supporting heartburn relief.
remedy_constituents: Anthraquinones: These compounds help alleviate heartburn by reducing inflammation in the esophagus and protecting the mucous membrane from acid damage.
Saponins: Saponins in Aloe vera have anti-inflammatory properties, which help soothe the esophageal lining and reduce irritation, providing relief from heartburn symptoms.
Polysaccharides: The prebiotic properties of polysaccharides in Aloe vera help maintain a healthy gut microbiome, preventing digestive issues that can contribute to heartburn.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are primarily used due to their high concentration of gel, which helps soothe and protect the digestive tract, reducing heartburn symptoms.

Gel (from Leaves): The gel extracted from the leaves is often used because it contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help calm the digestive system and reduce inflammation associated with heartburn.

Inner Leaf Gel (from Leaves): The inner gel of the leaves is used specifically because of its high content of mucilage, a thick, protective substance that coats the digestive tract and provides relief from heartburn and acid reflux.
remedy_recipe: Harvest mature aloe vera leaves with thick green skin and store them in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
Cut the aloe vera leaves into small pieces weighing about 200 grams per capsule filling.
Dry the aloe vera pieces in a dehydrator at 50 degrees celsius for 24 to 48 hours.
Grind the dried aloe vera into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 200 milligrams of the aloe vera powder and seal them tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties that aid in reducing inflammation and soothing the esophageal lining. The capsaicin found in ginger also stimulates the production of saliva, which helps to neutralize stomach acid and reduce symptoms of heartburn. Additionally, ginger has a relaxing effect on the digestive system, helping to alleviate muscle spasms that can exacerbate heartburn. As a result, taking herbal ginger capsules regularly can provide relief from frequent heartburn episodes.
remedy_properties: Digestive enzyme stimulant: Ginger stimulates digestive enzymes to break down food more efficiently, reducing the likelihood of stomach acid reflux and heartburn symptoms.
Anti-inflammatory agent: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, which can exacerbate heartburn symptoms.
Spasmolytic agent: Ginger has a natural ability to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing muscle spasms that can contribute to heartburn and acid reflux.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, which can alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Shogaols: Similar to gingerols, shogaols have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe the stomach lining and reduce inflammation, thereby alleviating heartburn symptoms.
Zingerone: This compound has antioxidant properties that help protect the stomach lining from acid damage and reduce inflammation, which can help alleviate heartburn symptoms.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The most commonly used part due to its high concentration of gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Roots: Used as an alternative to rhyzomes, roots of Zingiber officinale also contain gingerols and shogaols, making them effective in reducing heartburn symptoms.
Buds: Some products use the buds of Zingiber officinale, which have a higher concentration of zingerone, a compound that may help reduce inflammation and alleviate heartburn symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 grams of fresh zingiber officinale rhizomes with high oil content and minimal mold.
Dry the harvested rhizomes in a well-ventilated area at 40 degrees celsius for 48 hours.
Grind 10 grams of dried zingiber officinale into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with 200 milligrams of the zingiber officinale powder each.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 12 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hollyhock capsules helps with heartburn because they contain a natural combination of herbs that work together to alleviate symptoms. The main active ingredient, marshmallow root, coats the esophagus and stomach lining, reducing inflammation and irritation that can cause heartburn. Additionally, other herbs like licorice root and slippery elm help to soothe and calm the digestive system, allowing for proper digestion and reducing the likelihood of acid reflux and burning sensations in the chest.
remedy_properties: Alkaloids: Hollyhock capsules contain alkaloids, which can help neutralize stomach acid and provide relief from heartburn symptoms by reducing acidity in the digestive tract.

Tannins: Tannins present in hollyhock capsules have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and protect the mucous membranes of the esophagus and stomach, reducing inflammation caused by heartburn.

Saponins: Saponins in hollyhock capsules have natural antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help combat infections that may be contributing to heartburn symptoms, such as Helicobacter pylori (H. pylori) bacteria.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Alcea rosea may help with heartburn by reducing inflammation and relaxing the muscles in the esophagus, preventing acid reflux.
Saponins: Saponins found in Alcea rosea may help with heartburn by creating a protective barrier in the stomach, preventing stomach acid from flowing back up into the esophagus.
Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids present in Alcea rosea may help with heartburn by reducing inflammation and modulating the gut microbiome, which can contribute to the development of heartburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: Alcea rosea roots may be used due to their potential anti-inflammatory properties, which could help soothe heartburn symptoms.
Leaves: Alcea rosea leaves may be used for their antiseptic properties, which could help reduce inflammation and alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Seeds: Alcea rosea seeds may be used due to their potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which could help protect the digestive system and alleviate heartburn symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Dry the alcea rosea flowers in a single layer at room temperature for 7-10 days to preserve potency.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 2-3 minutes.
Mix the powder with a small amount of cornstarch or other binding agent in a 1:1 ratio by weight.
Fill a gelatin capsule with 250-500 milligrams of the herbal powder mixture.
Store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with heartburn because they soothe the digestive tract, calming inflammation and reducing muscle spasms that can exacerbate symptoms. The natural anti-inflammatory properties of chamomile also help to neutralize stomach acid and reduce the burning sensation associated with heartburn. Additionally, chamomile's gentle, non-irritating nature makes it an effective remedy for sensitive stomachs, providing relief without disrupting the body's natural digestion processes.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as apigenin and luteolin, can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, which can exacerbate heartburn symptoms.

Antacid properties: The mucilages present in chamomile have a soothing effect on the mucous membranes of the digestive tract, helping to neutralize stomach acid and provide relief from heartburn pain.
Relaxant properties: Chamomile's flavonoids can help relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing spasms and contractions that can contribute to heartburn symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Apigenin: Apigenin is a flavonoid that helps alleviate heartburn symptoms by reducing inflammation in the esophagus and relaxing the muscles in the lower esophageal sphincter.
Matricarin: Matricarin is a sesquiterpene lactone that has anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which help calm the digestive tract and reduce heartburn symptoms.

Luteolin: Luteolin is a flavonoid that possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help protect the esophagus from acid damage and reduce the frequency and severity of heartburn episodes.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers are the most commonly used part due to their high content of apigenin and luteolin, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that help alleviate heartburn symptoms.
Leaves: The leaves contain flavonoids, especially apigenin, which can help reduce inflammation and provide relief from heartburn and digestive issues.

Seeds: The seeds of Matricaria chamomilla contain essential oils, including chamazulene, which can help soothe the digestive tract and reduce inflammation, making them a useful part for heartburn capsules.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of matricaria chamomilla flowers from a clean and dry environment on a sunny day.
Dry the flowers in a low temperature oven at 40 degrees celsius for 24 hours to preserve the potency.
Grind 20 grams of the dried flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powder with 10 grams of gelatin and 50 milliliters of water in a bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the mixture and seal them tightly for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Broad-leaved lime capsules helps with heartburn because of its natural anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate symptoms such as burning sensations and discomfort. The herb's soothing effects can also calm the digestive system, allowing stomach acid to flow more smoothly into the intestines, reducing the likelihood of acid reflux and heartburn episodes. Additionally, broad-leaved lime capsules may help strengthen the lower esophageal sphincter, preventing stomach contents from flowing back up into the esophagus and exacerbating heartburn symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Broad-leaved lime capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, which can alleviate symptoms of heartburn such as burning and discomfort.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in broad-leaved lime capsules help protect the digestive tract from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate heartburn symptoms.

Gastroprotective properties: Broad-leaved lime capsules contain compounds that have been shown to stimulate mucin production in the stomach lining, helping to protect it from acid damage and reduce the risk of heartburn.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These polyphenolic compounds help alleviate heartburn by reducing inflammation in the esophagus and improving the barrier function of the gut lining, thereby preventing acid reflux.

Terpenoids (including linalool and linalyl acetate): These volatile compounds have a soothing effect on the digestive system, reducing inflammation and spasms in the esophagus, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms.

Phenolic acids (including rosmarinic acid): These compounds exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the esophageal mucosa from acid damage and reduce the severity of heartburn symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Leaves are used to make capsules for heartburn due to their anti-inflammatory properties, which help soothe digestive issues.
Buds: Buds are used to make capsules for heartburn due to their ability to calm digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the stomach.
Flowers: Flowers are used to make capsules for heartburn due to their anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which help alleviate heartburn symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Dry 2 parts of tilia platyphyllos leaves and flowers at 40°c for 2 hours to preserve their properties.
Crush 10 grams of the dried tilia platyphyllos mixture into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powder with 2 grams of vegetable cellulose and 1 gram of silicon dioxide.
Fill 10 empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the tilia platyphyllos powder mixture.
Store the herbal tilia platyphyllos capsules in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder capsules helps with heartburn because they contain alkaloids that help neutralize stomach acid, reducing inflammation in the esophagus and relieving symptoms of heartburn. The anti-inflammatory properties of elder also soothe and calm the digestive tract, decreasing muscle spasms that can contribute to heartburn. Additionally, elder capsules may help reduce the production of stomach acid, providing long-lasting relief from heartburn discomfort.
remedy_properties: Antioxidants: Elderberry contains powerful antioxidants that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory compounds: Elderberry has anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and anthocyanins, which help reduce swelling and irritation in the esophageal lining, alleviating heartburn discomfort.

Alkaline properties: Elder capsules have an alkalizing effect on the body, helping to neutralize stomach acid and reduce the risk of reflux and heartburn by maintaining a healthy pH balance in the digestive system.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Sambucus nigra help alleviate heartburn by reducing inflammation in the esophagus and alleviating symptoms of acid reflux.
Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in Sambucus nigra possess anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce inflammation and irritation in the esophagus and alleviate symptoms of heartburn.

Anthocyanins: Anthocyanins in Sambucus nigra act as antioxidants, which help to protect the esophageal lining from damage caused by stomach acid and reduce the frequency and severity of heartburn episodes.
remedy_parts: Flowers: The flowers are commonly used to make heartburn capsules due to their antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties.
Fruits: The fruits, also known as elderberries, are used in heartburn capsules because of their ability to soothe the digestive tract and reduce inflammation.
Leaves: The leaves are used to make heartburn capsules due to their antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to calm the digestive system and reduce heartburn symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of fresh sambucus nigra berries from a clean and organic source.
Dry the berries in a warm place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Grind 200 grams of dried sambucus nigra berries into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powder with 100 grams of gelatin and 100 grams of water to form a capsule filler.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the sambucus nigra mixture and seal the capsules.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with heartburn because they contain natural oils that help relax the muscles in the esophagus, allowing food to pass more easily and reducing inflammation. The menthol in peppermint also helps neutralize stomach acid, which can irritate the esophageal lining and cause discomfort. By soothing the digestive tract and calming the symptoms of acid reflux, peppermint capsules provide effective relief from heartburn episodes, offering a natural solution for those suffering from this common condition.
remedy_properties: Digestive Easing Properties: Peppermint oil helps relax the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and spasms that can contribute to heartburn symptoms, making it easier to digest food.
Antioxidant Activity: Peppermint's high antioxidant content helps protect the stomach lining from damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate heartburn and other gastrointestinal issues.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: Peppermint's active compounds, such as menthol and methanol, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach, alleviating heartburn symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Menthol: Menthol is a terpene that helps with heartburn by relaxing the muscles in the digestive tract, reducing inflammation, and relieving spasms that can contribute to heartburn symptoms.
Menthone: Menthone is another terpene in peppermint that helps with heartburn by reducing inflammation in the digestive tract, which can contribute to heartburn and acid reflux symptoms.

Rosmarinic acid: Rosmarinic acid is a phenolic compound in peppermint that helps with heartburn by reducing inflammation and protecting the stomach lining from acid damage, which can contribute to heartburn and acid reflux symptoms.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are the primary source of menthol and menthone, which provide relief from heartburn symptoms.
Rhyzomes: They contain oils that help alleviate digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the stomach.
Stems: While less commonly used than leaves, some products use peppermint stems for their antispasmodic properties, which help relax stomach muscles and reduce heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 cup of fresh mentha x piperita leaves and stems in the morning when they are at their peak potency.
Dry the harvested leaves and stems in a single layer at 100°f for 2 hours or until brittle.
Crush 2 tablespoons of dried mentha x piperita into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 1/2 teaspoon of the mentha x piperita powder with 1/4 teaspoon of a natural binder such as tapioca starch.
Fill gelatin capsules with 1/4 teaspoon of the powder mixture and seal immediately to preserve potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with heartburn because they contain Passiflora incarnata, a natural herb that has anti-inflammatory and antacid properties. The herb soothes and relaxes the muscles in the esophagus and stomach, reducing inflammation and acid reflux. Additionally, maypop's flavonoids and saponins help to neutralize excess stomach acid, providing quick relief from heartburn symptoms. By promoting a healthier digestive tract, maypop capsules can also reduce the frequency and severity of heartburn episodes, making it an effective natural remedy for managing this common condition.
remedy_properties: Glycosides: The glycosides present in Maypop Capsules have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.
Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Maypop Capsules have antioxidant properties, which can help neutralize acidity and reduce oxidative stress that can contribute to heartburn symptoms.

Amino Acids: The amino acids present in Maypop Capsules, such as glutamine and glycine, can help soothe the mucous membranes in the esophagus and stomach, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These plant compounds have a soothing effect on the digestive system, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to heartburn symptoms.
Alkaloids (specifically Harmine): Harmine has a relaxing effect on the muscles in the esophagus, helping to prevent the reflux of stomach acid that causes heartburn.
Saponins: Saponins have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate heartburn symptoms by soothing the mucous membranes.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are used to make capsules for heartburn relief due to their high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties.
Roots: The roots are used to make capsules for heartburn relief due to their high content of flavonoids and glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties.
Fruits: The fruits are used to make capsules for heartburn relief due to their high content of flavonoids and carotenoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of passiflora incarnata flowers in the morning after dew has fallen but before midday heat.
Dry the flowers in a single layer at 50°c for 2 hours to reduce moisture content.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder for 5 minutes.
Mix 1 part of the powder with 2 parts of gelatin to create a uniform mixture.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with heartburn because they contain a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has been shown to soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the esophagus. This protection helps to reduce inflammation and irritation caused by stomach acid, providing relief from the burning sensation associated with heartburn. Additionally, licorice capsules may also help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract, allowing food to pass more smoothly through the system and reducing the likelihood of stomach contents flowing back up into the esophagus.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the mucous membranes in the stomach and esophagus, helping to reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.

Licochalcone A: This flavonoid has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect the mucous membranes from damage caused by acid reflux and reduce inflammation in the digestive tract.

Licoricidin: This compound has been found to have a direct effect on the stomach lining, helping to strengthen it and reduce the production of stomach acid, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps soothe and protect the mucous membranes in the esophagus, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with heartburn.
Barks: The barks of the licorice plant have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including heartburn, due to their anti-inflammatory properties and ability to reduce acidity.
remedy_recipe: Dry the fresh or dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots in a low-temperature oven at 60°c for 2 hours to remove excess moisture.
Grind the dried glycyrrhiza glabra roots into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered root with 100mg of vegetable glycerin and 500mg of rice flour in a small bowl to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with approximately 250-300mg of the herbal blend and seal them immediately to maintain freshness.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months or until they are consumed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with heartburn because they contain properties that reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate acid reflux symptoms. The herb's bitter compounds stimulate the digestive system, promoting the production of stomach digestive enzymes and acids, which help to neutralize excess stomach acid that can cause heartburn. Additionally, dandelion's antacid properties work to soothe the mucous membranes in the esophagus, providing relief from burning sensations and discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Dandelion's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as taraxasterol, can reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, alleviating symptoms of heartburn.

Soften and neutralize acids: The mucilages present in dandelion root and leaf have a soothing effect on the digestive tract, helping to soften and neutralize excess stomach acid that contributes to heartburn.

Stimulate digestion and gut motility: Dandelion's bitter compounds can stimulate digestive enzymes and improve gut motility, reducing symptoms of indigestion and heartburn by promoting efficient digestion and absorption.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain inulin, a prebiotic fiber that helps soothe and protect the digestive tract, reducing symptoms of heartburn.
Fruits: The fruits, also known as seed heads or achenes, have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including heartburn, due to their bitter and anti-inflammatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh taraxacum officinale roots in the morning after dew has dried.
Cleanly wash and chop 50 grams of roots into small pieces using scissors.
Dry chopped roots in a low-temperature oven at 60°c for 24 hours or use desiccant.
Grind dried roots into fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle then sift through mesh screen to remove large particles.
Fill 100 capsules with 250mg of powdered taraxacum officinale root mixture and seal using capsule machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sea kale capsules helps with heartburn because they contain a natural compound that soothes and calms the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and irritation in the esophagus and stomach. The antioxidants present in sea kale also help to neutralize acidity and prevent damage to the mucous membranes, providing long-lasting relief from symptoms of heartburn. By promoting healthy digestion and reducing inflammation, sea kale capsules offer a natural solution for alleviating heartburn discomfort.
remedy_properties: Antacid properties: Sea kale contains mucilage, a thick, protective substance that helps neutralize stomach acid and soothe the esophageal lining, reducing symptoms of heartburn.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The flavonoids present in sea kale capsules have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate discomfort associated with heartburn.

Gastroprotective properties: Sea kale's antioxidant compounds can protect the stomach lining from damage caused by stomach acid and bile salts, reducing the risk of ulcers and other complications that may contribute to heartburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and protect the digestive tract from acid reflux.
Rhyzomes: Containing mucilage, a thick, protective substance that forms a barrier against stomach acids and helps reduce inflammation in the esophagus.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried cochlearia officinalis flowers and leaves measuring one part by weight.
Combine the dried herb with gelatin powder in a ratio of 10:3 by weight for capsule filling.
Mix the herb-gelatin blend with distilled water in a double boiler to create a consistent paste form.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the cooled herbal mixture and seal them immediately using a capsule machine.
Label and store the prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Echinacea's antioxidant compounds help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and oxidative stress, potential underlying factors in various diseases.

Immune system support: Echinacea's immunomodulatory effects may help boost the immune system, allowing it to respond more effectively to infections and reduce inflammation, which could alleviate symptoms of certain conditions.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Echinacea contains compounds that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory activity, which could help soothe and calm irritated tissues, potentially reducing pain and discomfort associated with various conditions.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Kansas coneflower contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and relieve symptoms of heartburn.
Seeds: The seeds of the Kansas coneflower have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, including heartburn, due to their ability to soothe and calm the stomach.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried echinacea angustifolia flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Mix the ground echinacea angustifolia powder with gelatin and distilled water in a ratio of 5:3:1 to form a uniform mixture for 15 minutes.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with approximately 400 milligrams of the echinacea angustifolia-gelatin mixture using a capsule filler machine or scoop for about 10 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for at least two weeks to allow for proper drying and hardening for 14 days.
Use one to three capsules orally per day, taken with water before meals or as needed for heartburn relief for a period of four to six weeks or as recommended by a healthcare practitioner.
remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with heartburn because they contain a unique blend of herbs that soothe and protect the lining of the esophagus. The active compounds in coneflower, such as triterpenoids and polyphenols, have anti-inflammatory properties that reduce inflammation and irritation caused by acid reflux. This natural remedy also helps to strengthen the lower esophageal sphincter muscle, preventing stomach acid from flowing back up into the esophagus and alleviating symptoms of heartburn.

Highbush cranberry capsules helps with heartburn because they contain a unique blend of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that have potent anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds work synergistically to reduce inflammation in the esophageal lining, thereby alleviating symptoms of heartburn such as burning sensations, acid reflux, and discomfort. The natural anti-inflammatory action also helps to soothe and protect the digestive tract, promoting a healthy gut environment and reducing the risk of chronic heartburn and related complications.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Highbush cranberry contains antioxidants that help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to heartburn symptoms such as burning sensations in the esophagus.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds present in highbush cranberry capsules may help alleviate heartburn symptoms by reducing inflammation in the esophageal lining and decreasing acid production in the stomach.

Gastroprotective properties: Highbush cranberry contains compounds that have been shown to protect the mucous membranes of the digestive tract, including those lining the esophagus, from damage caused by gastric acid and other irritants, which can exacerbate heartburn symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, which help alleviate heartburn symptoms by reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues.
Barks: Contain flavonoids and tannins, which have natural antacid properties that neutralize stomach acid and provide relief from heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried vaccinium macrocarpon fruit at dawn when dew is present for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested fruit in a dehydrator on low heat for 6-8 hours to reduce moisture content.
Crush the dried fruit into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle within 24 hours of drying.
Mix 200mg of powdered vaccinium macrocarpon with 100mg of filler material such as potato starch in a glass container.
Fill gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture and seal immediately for long-term storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dog holly capsules helps with heartburn because they contain natural ingredients that soothe and calm the digestive tract. The herbal extracts in these capsules work to reduce inflammation and irritation, which can cause acid reflux and burning sensations in the chest. Additionally, dog holly capsules may help strengthen the lower esophageal sphincter muscle, reducing the likelihood of stomach contents flowing back up into the esophagus and alleviating heartburn symptoms. By promoting digestive harmony and reducing discomfort, dog holly capsules offer a natural solution for managing heartburn.
remedy_properties: Antacid and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Dog Holly capsules have been found to neutralize stomach acid and reduce inflammation in the esophagus, providing relief from heartburn symptoms.

Spasmolytic Property: The active compounds present in Dog Holly capsules can relax the lower esophageal sphincter (LES), preventing it from spasming and allowing food to pass through the esophagus more smoothly, reducing heartburn episodes.
Antioxidant Activity: Dog Holly capsules contain antioxidants that help protect the stomach lining from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and acid reflux.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Dog Holly contain alkaloids like cinnamyl chavicol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate heartburn symptoms.

Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are underground stems that store starch and nutrients. They contain compounds like quercetin, a flavonoid with antacid properties that help neutralize stomach acid and relieve heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ruscus aculeatus leaves and stems in the morning after dew has evaporated weighing approximately 100g.
Wash the harvested material with cold running water to remove dirt and debris then pat dry with clean paper towels.
Combine the dried ruscus aculeatus leaves and stems with 500ml of cold filtered water in a glass jar allowing it to steep for 8 hours.
Strain the liquid mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into another container discarding the solids then add 250g of glycerin as a preservative.
Fill clean empty gelatin capsules with the herbal extract solution using an encapsulating machine and label the containers with the date and ingredients.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Hawthorn capsules helps with heartburn because they contain flavonoids, which have a soothing effect on the digestive tract. The capsules also contain antioxidants that help to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and stomach lining, making it easier for food to digest without irritating the tissue. Additionally, hawthorn's anti-inflammatory properties can help to relax the lower esophageal sphincter, preventing stomach acid from flowing back up into the esophagus and causing heartburn symptoms.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Hawthorn capsules contain flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, helping to reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate symptoms of heartburn.

Proanthocyanidins: Proanthocyanidins present in hawthorn capsules help to strengthen the lower esophageal sphincter (LES), reducing acid reflux and preventing stomach contents from flowing back up into the esophagus, thus alleviating heartburn symptoms.

Amino Acids: Hawthorn capsules contain amino acids like tartaric acid, which helps to reduce inflammation and soothe the mucous membranes in the esophagus, providing relief from the burning sensation associated with heartburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: Hawthorn roots contain flavonoids and terpenoids that help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making them effective for relieving heartburn symptoms.
Barks: The barks of the hawthorn plant contain a compound called quercetin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to alleviate the discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried c monogyna leaves and flowers according to local regulations.
Cleanly rinse the harvested material under running water to remove impurities.
Combine 250g of cleaned c monogyna with 500ml of boiling distilled water to create a strong infusion.
Steep the mixture for 30 minutes then strain through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a glass container.
Fill clean gelatin capsules with 1/2 teaspoon of dried c monogyna powder and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Butterbur capsules helps with heartburn because they contain Petasites hybridus, a natural herb that has anti-inflammatory properties. By reducing inflammation in the esophageal lining, butterbur helps to soothe and calm the digestive system, alleviating symptoms of acid reflux and heartburn. Additionally, the herb's ability to relax the stomach muscles can help prevent stomach contents from flowing back up into the esophagus, providing long-lasting relief from burning discomfort.
remedy_properties: Pyrrolizidine alkaloids: These compounds have been shown to reduce inflammation and relax smooth muscle in the esophagus, which can help alleviate symptoms of acid reflux and heartburn.
Flavonoids: Butterbur's flavonoid content has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against damage caused by stomach acid and reduce inflammation in the esophagus.
Terpenoids: The terpene content in butterbur capsules has natural anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, which can help calm the digestive system and reduce discomfort associated with heartburn.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the butterbur plant contain compounds that help reduce inflammation in the esophagus and alleviate symptoms of heartburn.
Barks: The barks of the butterbur plant have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe the lining of the esophagus and provide relief from heartburn.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried petasites hybridus herb from a trusted source or store-bought package.
Grind the dried petasites hybridus into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder.
Mix 500 mg of ground petasites hybridus with 250 mg of filler such as silica or calcium carbonate.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared herbal mixture and seal them securely with a capsule machine or hand-filling process.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate for longer preservation.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for heartburn are natural supplements made from plant-based ingredients that help alleviate symptoms of heartburn, also known as acid reflux. These capsules contain herbs like ginger, marshmallow root, and slippery elm that soothe the esophageal lining and reduce inflammation. By taking these capsules, individuals can experience relief from persistent heartburn pain, discomfort, and difficulty swallowing. For example, studies have shown that peppermint oil capsules can reduce heartburn symptoms by up to 50%, allowing people to enjoy their favorite foods again without worrying about discomfort.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to heartburn that are treated with herbal capsules are gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), acid indigestion, and stomach upset. Certain herbs like ginger, slippery elm, and marshmallow root have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe the digestive tract and alleviate symptoms of these conditions. Other herbs such as chamomile, peppermint, and licorice root also provide relief from heartburn-like symptoms by reducing inflammation and calming the stomach lining.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with heartburn is a blend of Aloe vera, Marshmallow root, and Licorice root. Aloe vera soothes and calms the esophageal lining, while Marshmallow root forms a protective barrier against acid reflux. Licorice root has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms. Additionally, Ginger root can be added to enhance digestion and reduce nausea. This combination can be taken 30 minutes before meals to provide relief from heartburn and acid reflux.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Journal of alternative and complementary medicine (New York, N.Y.), herbal capsules have shown to be effective in alleviating symptoms of heartburn due to gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD). The study, which reviewed 22 studies on the effects of medicinal plants in GERD, found that all herbal preparations used in human studies led to the alleviation of symptoms related to GERD, with some, such as Myrtus communis and Cydonia oblonga, showing marked reduction in GERD symptoms comparable to omeprazole. Additionally, the therapeutic effect of Cydonia oblonga persisted after discontinuation of the drug, indicating the potential long-term benefits of herbal capsules in managing heartburn symptoms.
